description:
Advances: specled.evidence_store, specled.mix_tasks

Deliverable:
1. SpecLedEx.Evidence.TreeHash (lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex): current-tree key mirrors `git add -A` — temp index seeded from HEAD (git read-tree HEAD under a unique per-invocation GIT_INDEX_FILE temp path), `git add -A` into that index, `git write-tree`. Base keys: `git rev-parse <ref>^{tree}`. `--end-of-options` hardening on interpolated refs (new call sites only).
2. SpecLedEx.Evidence.Entry (lib/specled_ex/evidence/entry.ex): canonical-JSON entry per the pinned format — {schema_version: 1, tree_hash, run_at (ISO-8601 UTC microsecond), run_id (32-hex random), specled_version, verification: {cover_id -> {strength, meets_minimum}}, findings: [...]} with findings in the exact normalized shape SpecLedEx.normalize_for_state/1 writes today (entity_id/level) so FindingsDelta's signature function is untouched. Lexicographic (run_at, run_id) comparison; filename regex ^[0-9a-f]{40,64}\.json$ validated on read. Serialize via the existing SpecLedEx.Json canonical writer.
3. SpecLedEx.Evidence.Store (lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex), local-only by module contract (zero network; Sync in S3 is the only network surface): read(root, tree_hash) via git cat-file (:absent when ref/entry missing); record(root, entry) building the new evidence tree via hash-object -w + temp-index update-index --cacheinfo + write-tree, then commit-tree, then CAS `update-ref refs/heads/spec-evidence <new> <expected>` with 5 attempts, 50ms x attempt linear backoff +/-50% jitter; on exhaustion named evidence/local_write_failed warning, caller exit unaffected. Local same-key re-run applies highest-run-stamp-wins (identical rule to the S3 sync merge). Self-creates the orphan ref (parentless commit-tree) when absent. Never checks anything out; plumbing only.
4. mix spec.check integration: after verification report + branch guard complete, build the entry (per-cover outcomes + findings list) and Store.record/2. Write failure = named warning, exit status unaffected. Task moduledoc documents the ref-write side effect and zero-network guarantee.
5. Spec work: .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md ALREADY AUTHORED at distill (status: draft) — flip status to active if repo convention requires, flip the S2 verification stub (write-path group + attestation group) execute:false->true as tests land, amend if implementation forces requirement changes (via ADR). Amend mix_tasks.spec.md for the check-run evidence write.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new test/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash_test.exs, entry_test.exs, store_test.exs; updated test/mix/tasks/spec_check_test.exs. Flip evidence_store stubs: write-path group (tree_hash_mirrors_add_all, per_entry_isolation, run_stamp_wins, local_cas_bounded, self_create, local_only_write_path) and attestation group (attestation_never_gates).
- Behaviors to demonstrate (scenario IDs from evidence_store.spec.md): scenario.check_key_equals_commit_tree (entry key equals ^{tree} of `git add -A && git commit` from same working-tree state, untracked non-ignored file included, ignored file excluded, ref self-created); scenario.entry_is_isolated_canonical_json; scenario.same_key_higher_stamp_replaces (constructed stamps, no wall-clock races); scenario.concurrent_local_writers_both_survive (pre-move the ref between read and update -> CAS retry preserves both entries); scenario.check_offline_write_failure_never_gates; scenario.evidence_never_gates.
- Verification cadence:
  - Iteration tier: compile-graph-scoped checks only (mix test --stale or named files) plus mix spec.check --no-run-commands.
  - Final tier: full merge-gate suite run-until-green before IMPLEMENTED.
  - Verifier tier: flipped stubs + targeted/--stale only; no full suite.
- Standing bounce-class checks:
  - Production call site named for each new callable surface, with proving test on that production path
  - Fixture hygiene: tmp git repos + GIT_INDEX_FILE temp paths cleaned up; no cross-test leakage
  - Spec surfaces fresh for every touched callable/config surface
  - Every conditional clause covered by a test (CAS retry branches, self-create branch, absent-ref read)
- Call-site Integration: Evidence.Store.record/2 called from Mix.Tasks.Spec.Check.run/1 after gate completion (production caller); proven by spec_check_test.exs running the task in a tmp git repo and asserting ref + entry + `git add -A` tree equivalence end-to-end.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/sync.ex, lib/mix/tasks/spec.sync.ex, lib/mix/tasks/spec.prune.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/review/** (S4)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.*, priv/hooks/** (S5)
- lib/specled_ex/base_view.ex, lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex (S1, done)
- docs/**, priv/spec_init/**, skills/**, .gitignore
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/entry.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex
- test/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/evidence/entry_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/evidence/store_test.exs
- test/mix/tasks/spec_check_test.exs
- .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md (stub flips execute:false->true; status flip; amendments only via ADR)
- .spec/specs/mix_tasks.spec.md (check-run evidence-write amendment + stub flips)
- .spec/state.json, .spec/realization_hashes.json (tool-managed regen — NOT scope creep)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Zero network I/O anywhere in this stage's code paths — no fetch, no push, no auto-sync.
- spec.check still writes state.json (removed in S5); do not touch that write path.
- No consumer reads evidence yet (S4). No hook, no migration.
- Evidence write failure must never affect spec.check exit status.
- No timing-based assertions: run-stamp tests use constructed stamps (fixtures), never raced DateTime.utc_now() calls.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (mix compile --warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (mix spec.check; adjudicate against S1 baseline note)
- [ ] mix format --check-formatted; mix deps.unlock --check-unused
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: codex-bd5ce47d
Log: /Users/mz/.local/state/agentic-runs/specled_ex/specled_-csg.2/codex-bd5ce47d/log

Commit: a3da6158eec5afa5ed3b1d6fe6499a02235a13a4
Files touched: .spec/decisions/specled.decision.evidence_orphan_branch_split.md, .spec/realization_hashes.json, .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md, .spec/specs/mix_tasks.spec.md, .spec/specs/verification.spec.md, .spec/state.json, lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex, lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex, lib/specled_ex/evidence/entry.ex, lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex, test/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash_test.exs, test/specled_ex/evidence/entry_test.exs, test/specled_ex/evidence/store_test.exs, test/mix/tasks/spec_check_test.exs
Tests added: SpecLedEx.Evidence.TreeHashTest current tree mirrors git add -A with untracked, deleted, and ignored files; SpecLedEx.Evidence.TreeHashTest base resolves a ref tree using end-of-options hardened rev-parse; SpecLedEx.Evidence.EntryTest builds canonical JSON with verification outcomes and normalized findings; SpecLedEx.Evidence.EntryTest validates entry filenames on read; SpecLedEx.Evidence.EntryTest latest keeps the lexicographically highest run stamp; SpecLedEx.Evidence.StoreTest record self-creates the local orphan ref and stores one file per tree; SpecLedEx.Evidence.StoreTest read returns absent when the ref or entry does not exist; SpecLedEx.Evidence.StoreTest same-key records keep the highest constructed run stamp; SpecLedEx.Evidence.StoreTest CAS retry preserves a competing writer entry; SpecLedEx.Evidence.StoreTest CAS exhaustion returns a named warning instead of raising; Mix.Tasks.Spec.CheckEvidenceTest spec.check writes local evidence keyed by the git add -A tree; Mix.Tasks.Spec.CheckEvidenceTest spec.check evidence write warnings do not gate the task
Verification stubs flipped: specled.evidence_store write-path group (tree_hash_mirrors_add_all, per_entry_isolation, run_stamp_wins, local_cas_bounded, self_create, local_only_write_path) command execute:false -> tagged_tests execute:true; specled.evidence_store attestation_never_gates command execute:false -> tagged_tests execute:true; added specled.tasks.check_evidence_write tagged_tests execute:true
Audit-expanded scope: None from AUDIT; branch guard required two additional current-truth touches outside the original Allowed touches: .spec/decisions/specled.decision.evidence_orphan_branch_split.md and .spec/specs/verification.spec.md. The requested durable log path was not writable in this sandbox, so command output was tee'd to /tmp/specled_-csg.2-codex-bd5ce47d.log but the substituted Log path is preserved above.

Summary: Implemented the local evidence ledger write path with add-all tree hashing, canonical per-tree entries, plumbing-only orphan-ref storage, bounded CAS retry, self-create, and highest-run-stamp replacement. Wired mix spec.check to write evidence after the strict gate and to warn without changing exit status on evidence write failure; final merge gates passed, including full tests and mix spec.check --base HEAD after rerunning one isolated tagged-test flake.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 8384310d-16ba-4102-b635-60dea30661d7
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/8384310d-16ba-4102-b635-60dea30661d7.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 14
- Files outside Allowed globs: 2 (.spec/decisions/specled.decision.evidence_orphan_branch_split.md, .spec/specs/verification.spec.md) — BOTH adjudicated genuinely branch-guard-forced (see below), not scope creep.
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0

Adjudication of the two disclosed extra touches:
- .spec/specs/verification.spec.md: adds `test/mix/tasks/spec_check_test.exs` to the verification subject surface. FORCED by branch_guard.file_touch_tagged_tests_attested — the touched test file carries a pre-existing `@tag spec: "specled.verify.command_timeout_cli_precedence"` (a requirement OWNED by subject specled.verification, verification.spec.md:107). Touching the file forces the covering subject to attest it. Single-line surface addition; no requirement/behavior change. LEGITIMATE.
- .spec/decisions/specled.decision.evidence_orphan_branch_split.md: adds a 3-line consequences bullet. FORCED by branch_guard.cross_cutting_decision — needs_decision_update?/2 (branch_check.ex:424) fires when >1 policy file spans >1 subject. This diff spans evidence_store (new lib/specled_ex/evidence/*) and mix_tasks (lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex) surfaces, so a decision co-change is mandatory to avoid branch_guard_missing_decision_update (:error). The chosen ADR is the one that owns the evidence_store subject and the exact write-path behavior described. LEGITIMATE.

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: flipped tagged_tests groups (evidence_store write-path: tree_hash_mirrors_add_all, per_entry_isolation, run_stamp_wins, local_cas_bounded, self_create, local_only_write_path; attestation_never_gates; mix_tasks check_evidence_write). Executed via the covering test files; passed: all.
- Requirements coverage (in-scope musts only; sync/prune/migrate/hook musts remain execute:false = correctly deferred to S3/S5):
  - specled.evidence_store.tree_hash_mirrors_add_all: covered by tree_hash_test.exs:8 + spec_check_test.exs (end-to-end key == HEAD^{tree}). Would fail if TreeHash.current omitted `git add -A`/HEAD seed or let an ignored file influence the key — the post-commit `rev-parse HEAD^{tree}` assertion would diverge.
  - specled.evidence_store.per_entry_isolation: covered by entry_test.exs (filename regex rejects ../bad.json and mismatched stem) + store_test.exs (one `<hash>.json` per tree). Would fail if Store wrote an aggregated file or decode_file accepted an invalid filename — ls-tree names / :invalid_entry assertions would break.
  - specled.evidence_store.run_stamp_wins: covered by entry_test.exs latest/3 + store_test.exs same-key. Constructed stamps only (no wall-clock). Would fail if latest/3 kept the lower (run_at,run_id) — stored run_id would be the older value.
  - specled.evidence_store.local_cas_bounded: covered by store_test.exs CAS-retry (real competing writer via before_update seam; production caller passes no hook) + CAS-exhaustion. Would fail if update_ref dropped the expected-old CAS arg (competing T2 clobbered/lost) or exhaustion raised instead of returning {:warning, evidence/local_write_failed}.
  - specled.evidence_store.self_create: covered by store_test.exs self-create + spec_check_test.exs (fresh repo, ref self-created). Would fail if commit_tree didn't handle the :absent-parent branch — record would error on a fresh repo and the ref would never appear.
  - specled.evidence_store.local_only_write_path: covered structurally (grep: zero fetch/push/remote in lib/specled_ex/evidence/* and the check integration) + spec_check_test.exs offline run. Would fail if any network git verb were introduced into the write path.
  - specled.evidence_store.attestation_never_gates: covered by spec_check_test.exs "warnings do not gate" (task run completes without raising) + store_test.exs CAS-exhaustion warning. Would fail if record_evidence propagated write failure to exit status — run/1 would raise and the test would crash.
  - specled.tasks.check_evidence_write: covered by spec_check_test.exs end-to-end (real task in tmp git repo; asserts ref + entry filename == `git add -A && commit` HEAD^{tree} + verification map + findings==[]). Would fail if Store.record were not called after the gates — ls-tree of refs/heads/spec-evidence would be empty.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. Zero network I/O (grep-confirmed); state.json write path unchanged (spec.check.ex:81,98); no consumer reads Evidence.Store (only caller is spec.check via record; the Store.read hits in review/coverage_closure.ex and spec.triangle.ex are a different single-arg Store, and HashStore.read is realization hashes); write failure returns {:warning,...} and record_evidence returns :ok in every branch (exit unaffected); run-stamp tests use constructed fixtures, never raced DateTime.utc_now().
- Targeted verification: PASS — mix test on tree_hash_test.exs entry_test.exs store_test.exs spec_check_test.exs = 22 tests, 0 failures. mix format --check-formatted = clean. make smoke = READY (compile clean). (The stray `/bin/sh: specled_cmd_10.sh: No such file` line is a pre-existing command-verification fixture artifact, not a failure.)
- Full-suite verification: not run by verifier (by design).
- Audit-expanded scope (step 11): none — no prior AUDIT comments on this ticket.

Production-wiring trace (step 10): Evidence.Store.record/2 is called from Mix.Tasks.Spec.Check.run/1 via record_evidence/3 (spec.check.ex:125), positioned AFTER the validation Mix.raise gate (line 113) AND the branch-guard Mix.raise gate (line 122). Entry.verification_outcomes reads report["verification"]["claims"] (cover_id/strength/meets_minimum) — proven end-to-end by the spec_check test asserting decoded["verification"]["workspace.requirement"] == %{strength: "linked", meets_minimum: true} against the REAL validate report (not seam-mocked). Findings normalization round-trips through SpecLedEx.write_state (reaching the private normalize_findings/1) rather than the ticket-named normalize_for_state/1 — functionally correct (normalize_for_state always emits findings==[], so it could not have been used directly); entry_test.exs asserts the resulting entity_id/level shape. No deliverable self-contradiction found.

Verdict: PASS

Gaps: none.

Notes (advisory only — do not change the verdict):
- Entry.normalized_findings/1 writes a throwaway state.json into System.tmp_dir!() per entry build (local file I/O, no network; cleaned up with File.rm) purely to reach the private normalize_findings/1 via write_state. Correct and shape-verified, but heavier than a direct normalizer call; a future refactor could expose the finding normalizer directly.
- attestation_never_gates is exercised only through its S2-relevant slice (write failure never gates + no consumer exists yet). The fuller scenario.evidence_never_gates (base-evidence classification not consumed by the weakening guard; deleting the ref not changing exit status) is only meaningfully testable once S4 wires a consumer — not a gap for this stage.
- .spec/realization_hashes.json regen added several module-level api_boundary entries (e.g. Mix.Tasks.Spec.Check, SpecLedEx.Config.BranchGuard) beyond the ticket's own surfaces. Tool-managed regen, explicitly in Allowed touches (NOT scope creep) — noted only for the orchestrator's awareness of the broad hash refresh.

title: S2: Local evidence store + spec.check write path
